feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2997
entry.content: >Terabytits Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84049766/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Something I think about often.
entry.content: When I was 11, my best friend and I were having a sleepover. During it, she introduced me to a website called Omegle. I'd never heard of it before, so being a curious kid, I tried it out. At first, it was actually kind of fun. We talked to randoms, got flashed a few times (which was disgusting), and spent most of the night trolling strangers. Then everything changed. We were waiting for the next video feed to connect. For a few seconds, there was no one on screen.. there was just silence. Then I
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /mu/ Music: HARD TIMES! After 5 consecutive albums flopping due to being schizotarded drug a…
entry.content: HARD TIMES! After 5 consecutive albums flopping due to being schizotarded drug abuse slop sessions, Bjork has reluctantly resigned to being a gas station wagie to make ends meet. Instead of selling the audiorape that came in every album after Medulla, she now sells Marlboro 100's and Four Loko's. Well? What do you have to say to her?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: When and why did the rock flute go out of style? I think we've had this discussi…

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Toti Soler
entry.content: To me, he's the Spanish equivalent of Miles Davis: reinvented the flamenco genre forever (even before Paco de Lucía would release Fuente y Caudal) and remains one of the most brilliant guitar players and composers I've ever heard.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /hpcg/ - High Performance Computing General
entry.content: "It scales on my laptop" edition previous: >>? READ THE MANUAL. PROFILE BEFORE POSTING. /hpcg/ is for discussing clusters, supercomputers, schedulers, accelerators, networking, parallel programming, numerical methods, and finding increasingly elaborate ways to avoid reading Intel's optimization manual. >What should I learn? Linux. Then Bash. Then C/C++. Then MPI. Then OpenMP. Then CUDA/HIP/SYCL. Then profiling. Then vectorization. Then NUMA. Then realize your code spends 93% of its runtime waiti
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Any Juke owners here?
entry.content: I love my Nissan Juke but I am a little worried about the cvt transmission. I bought fluid to flush and change it recently but I haven’t done it yet. I’m somewhere just over 130k miles. She’s been good to me for the past 2 years. I got her at 116k miles. 2012 sv awd. Share your juke experiences, stories, and opinions.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Birdwatching
entry.content: In your 30's? Looking for a dope activity that's outside? Birdwatching is it my man, it gives purpose to walks, gives you something to learn about your local area, and lets you meet likeminded people who love birds. Birds are very important and if you are looking for something new to do, birdwatching might just be for you!
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Name a bigger technological fall from grace
entry.content: Name a bigger technological fall from grace
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I found a physical register of Kronnix Linux on the back label of my 2013 iBox case.
entry.content: Look at the sticker. It came factory-installed with a completely forgotten, now lost-media Linux distro called "Linux Kronnix", customized by a local budget brand named iBUX.Unfortunately, the previous owner formatted the drive, so the OS is gone. Specs are a Pentium DC G2010 and 4GB DDR3.What should I do with this e-waste machine, /g/? Is anyone here familiar with these obscure third-world Linux distros?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology
